description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a matte black metal slide and frame, complemented by brown textured grips on both sides. The grip panels feature a diamond checkering pattern, likely made of wood or a wood-like composite, and are secured with visible screws. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is of standard length, with a smooth, unadorned exterior and a visible muzzle opening. The slide appears to lack prominent external markings or engravings, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The magazine base is flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile without any extensions or flares.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with brown checkered grips and a flush magazine base, featuring a smooth, unmarked slide and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, brown checkered grip, and the smooth, unmarked slide.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the slim profile, grip width, and the alignment of the slide and frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip texture, slide, and frame details similar to the first side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the barrel opening, front sight, and the rounded trigger guard.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a dark brown, diamond-checkered pattern that provides a secure, tactile surface for handling. It is contoured to fit the palm comfortably, with a slight swell in the middle and tapering at the top and bottom. The material appears to be wood or a wood-like composite, secured with two visible screws on each side. The checkering is fine and evenly distributed, enhancing grip stability. No visible logos, finger grooves, or additional embellishments are present, giving it a classic, utilitarian look.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, offering robust protection for the trigger area. It is smoothly contoured without any undercuts or squared-off edges, and there are no visible texturing or reinforcement features. The design is simple and functional, with no integrated accessories or distinctive styling elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length with a smooth, cylindrical profile and a visible muzzle opening. There are no external threads, ports, or compensators, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide. No markings or decorative features are visible on the barrel exterior.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, lacking manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and unobtrusive profile. There are no extensions, flares, finger rests, logos, or additional texturing visible on the magazine base.
